requirements: The CRM must unify customer data from three existing legacy systems.
Sales representatives must be able to track deal flow and pipeline.
Real-time dashboards for sales performance shall include revenue forecasting.
The system must automate lead assignment based on territory and product.
Integration with corporate email (Outlook) and calendar is required.
Customer 360 view shall include previous purchases and support tickets.
Mobile access for field sales must support offline data entry.
Automated marketing campaigns must allow personalized lead nurturing.
ROI target of 15% increase in conversion rates over 12 months.
Customer support case management must include SLA tracking.
Self-service portal shall allow customers to update their own contact info.
System must support multi-currency and multi-language for global sales.
nfrs: Privacy compliance with GDPR and CCPA is a non-negotiable requirement.
The system must handle 500 concurrent users without performance lag.
Data availability must be 99.9% with geographically distributed servers.
Transition from legacy to CRM must be completed within 6 months.

Market Entry Strategy.text: Pilot launch in European market (GDPR focus)

Strategic Risk & Mitigation.text: Executive sponsorship from VP of Sales

requirements: The ERP system must integrate finance, procurement, and inventory.
Automatic journal entry creation for every AP/AR transaction.
Production planning module must consider machine and labor capacity.
Inventory levels across all 5 warehouses must stay synced in real-time.
The procurement module shall automate RFQ and PO processing.
Financial consolidation for three subsidiaries must be automated.
The system shall facilitate SOX compliance for audit tracking.
Cost accounting must support standard, average, and FIFO methods.
Strategic vendor management module shall track performance and quality.
The system must support payroll processing for 2,000 employees.
Real-time cash flow statements must be available for leadership.
E-invoicing with government portals must be supported (compliance).
nfrs: System must support 1,000 concurrent internal users in manufacturing.
Disaster recovery must ensure zero data loss during failed failover.
Initial implementation timeline must not exceed 18 months.
The user interface must be localized into French, Spanish, and German.

Market Entry Strategy.text: Global ERP standard for all M&A targets

Business Objectives & KPIs.text: Reduce monthly close time from 10 to 4 days

Strategic Risk & Mitigation.text: User adoption strategy and training module

Regulatory & Compliance.text: SOX compliance controls for financial reporting

requirements: Vendor portal must allow suppliers to update their own shipment status.
Procurement workflow shall require three-tier approval for orders >$50k.
KPI dashboards must track on-time delivery and supplier quality.
The system must integrate with major shipping carriers via EDI/API.
AI-driven demand forecasting shall use historical sales data.
Warehouse management module must optimize pick paths for efficiency.
Route optimization for the delivery fleet must update daily.
Inventory tracking shall use RFID technology for asset management.
The system must support automated stock replenishment based on safety stock.
Risk assessment engine shall flag potential weather or strike delays.
Environment tracking (ESG) for delivery emissions is required.
Supplier scorecarding must be accessible to procurement managers.
nfrs: Global visibility of all shipments must be updated every 30 minutes.
The system must handle 10,000 orders per day during peak seasons.
Cybersecurity for vendor data must be audited annually.
Vendor portal must support all modern browsers and mobile devices.

ROI & Financial Projections.text: Efficiency gains worth $500k in labor costs

Strategic Risk & Mitigation.text: Supply chain resilience and redundancy plan

Market Drivers & Competition.text: Reducing lead times to compete with Amazon
Transitioning to real-time supply chain monitoring

Regulatory & Compliance.text: Global customs and tariff database update

requirements: Points engine must calculate rewards based on purchase value and tier.
Tier management shall support Silver, Gold, and Platinum levels.
Redemption catalog must be accessible via mobile app and web.
Personalized offers shall be sent via push notifications and email.
Integration with in-store POS (Point of Sale) systems is mandatory.
Analytics dashboard for marketing must show engagement metrics.
Partnership module must allow points to be earned at allied brands.
Fraud detection system shall flag unusual points redemption patterns.
Birthday and anniversary bonus points must be automated.
The system must support gift card purchase and points transfer.
Member support dashboard must show full history of engagement.
Referral program shall reward users for successful new sign-ups.
nfrs: Data privacy for member profiles must follow GDPR and CCPA.
System must support 5 million active users with low latency.
Points calculations must be completed within 2 seconds of purchase.
Platform must be scalable to handle holiday and Black Friday surges.

Market Entry Strategy.text: Rollout to North American retail stores first

Business Objectives & KPIs.text: Targeting 30% increase in repeat purchase rate

Strategic Risk & Mitigation.text: Data security and privacy compliance officer

requirements: Account management must allow users to view balances and transactions.
Transaction limits must be configurable at the card and account level.
The system shall facilitate AML (Anti-Money Laundering) compliance checks.
Open banking API integration must follow PSD2 regulations.
Security features must include biometric login and device binding.
Real-time fraud detection shall flag suspicious cross-border transfers.
Push notifications must alert users of every debit/credit event.
Internal bank admin panel must monitor system health and liquidity.
Support for instant SEPA and international SWIFT transfers.
Automated credit scoring algorithm for instant loan applications.
Customers shall be able to open accounts digitally via e-KYC.
Customer support chat must be integrated directly into the app.
nfrs: System must maintain 99.999% availability for financial services.
End-to-end encryption for all financial messages is mandatory.
System must comply with PCI-DSS and national banking regulations.
Core banking processing must handle 50,000 transactions per second.

Market Entry Strategy.text: Fintech startup launch in EU (PSD2 focus)

Business Objectives & KPIs.text: Targeting 1 million active accounts in 24 months

Market Drivers & Competition.text: Capitalizing on the shift to branchless banking
Offer better FX rates than traditional banks

Regulatory & Compliance.text: PSD2 compliance for European open banking

Strategic Roadmap.text: Business and investment modules in Year 2
